zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Richard Griffin Baron of Latimer, of Braybrook於1360年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾韋斯頓時，他的父親Sir Thomas Allen Griffin, Knight Of Weston Favel Manor30歲，母親Elizabeth Latimer25歲。他於1380年與Anna Chamberlain在英國諾薩普頓史爾布雷布盧可結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1411年在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾韋斯頓享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Richard Griffin Baron of Latimer, of Braybrook于1360年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾韋斯頓时，他的父亲Sir Thomas Allen Griffin, Knight Of Weston Favel Manor30岁，母亲Elizabeth Latimer25岁。他于1380年与Anna Chamberlain在英国諾薩普頓史爾布雷布盧可结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1411年在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾韋斯頓享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: Griffin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh: from the personal name Gruffin, Griffin, a pet form of Middle Welsh Gruffudd. In the Welsh border counties this name was introduced directly from Welsh, and in the eastern counties of England by Bretons from France who came over with the Norman conquest.
Irish: Anglicized (part translated) form of Gaelic Ó Gríobhtha ‘descendant of Gríobhtha’, a personal name from gríobh ‘gryphon’.

variants.name: Griffee
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Gríobhtha (see Griffin ).

variants.name: Griffy
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Gríobhtha (see Griffin ).

variants.name: Griffey
meanings: Irish (Clare): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Gríobhtha (see Griffin ).

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Richard Griffin Baron of Latimer, of Braybrook was born in 1360, in Weston, Northamptonshire, England, his father, Sir Thomas Allen Griffin, Knight Of Weston Favel Manor, was 30 and his mother, Elizabeth Latimer, was 25. He married Anna Chamberlain in 1380, in Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1411, in Weston, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Richard Griffin Baron of Latimer, of Braybrook est né en 1360, à Weston, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Allen Griffin, Knight Of Weston Favel Manor, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Latimer, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Anna Chamberlain en 1380, à Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1411, à Weston, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Richard Griffin Baron of Latimer, of Braybrook 1360 in Weston, Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas Allen Griffin, Knight Of Weston Favel Manor 30 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Latimer 25. Er hat 1380 in Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, England Anna Chamberlain geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1411 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Weston, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard Griffin Baron of Latimer, of Braybrook è nato il nel 1360 nel Weston, Northamptonshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Thomas Allen Griffin, Knight Of Weston Favel Manor, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Latimer, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Anna Chamberlain nel 1380, nel Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1411, nel Weston, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Griffin Baron of Latimer, of Braybrookが1360年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアウエストンで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Allen Griffin, Knight Of Weston Favel Manorは30歳，母Elizabeth Latimerは25歳であった。1380年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアブレイブルークでAnna Chamberlainと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1411年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアウエストンで51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Griffin Baron of Latimer, of Braybrook(이)가 1360년 영국 노르섬프토실르 웨스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas Allen Griffin, Knight Of Weston Favel Manor(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Latimer(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1380년 영국 노르섬프토실르 브라이브룩에서 Anna Chamberlain(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1411년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 웨스턴에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard Griffin Baron of Latimer, of Braybrook nasceu em 1360, em Weston, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Allen Griffin, Knight Of Weston Favel Manor, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Latimer, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Anna Chamberlain em 1380, em Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1411, em Weston, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Richard Griffin Baron of Latimer, of Braybrook родился в 1360 г. в местности вестон, нортамптоншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas Allen Griffin, Knight Of Weston Favel Manor было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Latimer, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Anna Chamberlain в 1380 г. в местности брэибрук, нортамптоншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1411 г. в местности вестон, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 51 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Richard Griffin Baron of Latimer, of Braybrook nació en 1360, en Weston, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas Allen Griffin, Knight Of Weston Favel Manor, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Latimer, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Anna Chamberlain en 1380, en Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1411, en Weston, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 51 años.
